name: Ramadan Business Hours
description: Automatically pauses non-urgent workflows and adjusts task deadlines during Ramadan. Sends a courtesy notice to contacts about modified response times.
descriptionAr: يوقف تلقائيًا سير العمل غير العاجل ويعدّل مواعيد المهام خلال شهر رمضان. يرسل إشعارًا للعملاء بتعديل أوقات الاستجابة.

triggerConfig.description: Runs daily during Ramadan to adjust schedules

config.title: Ramadan Schedule Active
config.body: Business hours adjusted for Ramadan. Non-urgent follow-ups paused until after Iftar.
